subject: history
teaching_goal:
- Be able to describe the main manifestations and impacts of national independence movements in Asia, Africa, and Latin America.  
- Compare the different paths and outcomes of China, India, and African nations in resisting colonial oppression.  
- Analyze the role of the two World Wars in awakening Asian national movements.
transcript: [640.52 -> 740.08] 两位同学有思考好的呢好请问一下他们的会议里头在里头出现了争取民主主义和建议民主的一个建议议的在中国的话它是出席报告的议题的然后在那个大学议题之上就是看到它是也开展了这个民主主义的过程在印象上的话它就是开展了被报议所的过程请坐那么通过刚才同学的讲解以及老师在黑板上给大家展示的可以知道当时的在亚非拉地区的特别是中国印度以及非洲的埃及开展了广泛的反抗殖民者压迫的运动那么在中国可以知道在中国共产党的领导下我们中国实现了民族的独立那么在印度和非洲也在他们当时领导者的管理下逐步地实现了民族反抗的殖民者最后实现了民族的自由的运动那么通过本节课的学习我们可以知道在第一次世界大战以及后面的第二次世界大战之后我们为当时的世界带来了深重灾难的同时也促进了亚洲民族民族运动的觉醒那么通过对本节课的学习同学们可以知道在当今世界在不平等的国际关系仍有存在那么在此同时我们就应当携手并进在世界的浪潮中共同促进人类命运共同体促进世界的合并发展我的模拟授课到此结束。

edges.intent: China's efforts are part of the broader national independence movements.
India's efforts are part of the broader national independence movements.
Africa's efforts are part of the broader national independence movements.
World War I's impact contributes to the awakening of Asian national movements.
World War II's impact further awakens Asian national movements.
Historical movements contribute to understanding current international inequalities.
Global unity is seen as a solution to current inequalities.
The slide transitions to the assignment phase, supporting the themes on the blackboard.
The blackboard's text supports the discussion of national independence movements.
The concept of global unity is hinted at by the text on the blackboard.
Students are engaged with the topic of national independence movements as part of their learning.
